other_observers: Julie Webber (RMBO bander) Jill Brown Bill Maynard; Bill Maynard first observed the bird. The others caught just a fleeting glimpse soon after, but the bird was caught in a mist net, extracted, banded and photographed at 1:30.  I don't think anybody else saw the bird, nor has it been found on subsequent days.
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch, Holmes Grove, RMBO banding station.
description: This was a large thrush with rich cinnamon upperparts, bright white underparts, and large dark spots on the breast and flanks. It had large eyes and white eye rings.  see photosBehaviors: Not much observed except for foraging in dead leaves and broken branches in darker shaded areas beneath large cottonwoods and Russian Olives. It was silent.Call: NonePlumage: Hatch-year
photographer: Photographer: Steve Brown, Steven Brown, Steven Brown, Steven Brown
